expiring_today.title: Account Recievable Officer
expiring_today.salary: As per company salary scale policy
expiring_today.description: About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations. Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues. Job Description An Accounts Receivable Officer oversees the collection of payments owed to the company, monitors customer accounts, and ensures that invoices are issued and settled promptly. They act as the bridge between the finance department and clients, safeguarding the organization’s liquidity. Invoice Management Prepare, issue, and track invoices. Ensure accuracy of billing details and compliance with company policies. Payment Collection Follow up with clients on overdue accounts. Negotiate payment arrangements when necessary. Account Monitoring Maintain up-to-date records of receivables. Reconcile accounts and resolve discrepancies. Reporting Generate regular reports on receivables status. Provide insights to management on cash flow and debt risks. Compliance & Coordination Ensure adherence to accounting standards and internal controls. Collaborate with sales and customer service teams to resolve disputes. Job Requirements Education : Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration. Experience : 2–3 years in accounts receivable or related finance roles. Technical Skills : Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAP, Oracle). Soft Skills : Strong communication and negotiation abilities. Attention to detail and problem-solving mindset. Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines. Submission Guideline While applying kindly mention the Vacancy number “ARO-HKB-KABUL-2026” in the subject line of E-mail. Otherwise, your application may not be considered. Please do not send heavy size documents (i.e. Tazkira, Education documents, work certificates and etc.) Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the next stage of recruitment. NOTE: Local professionals with above mentioned criterias are prefferred. Submission Email hr@hindukush-bridge.com

details.Salary: As per company salary scale policy
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration

expiring_today.title: Financing Administrator
expiring_today.category: Administrative, Data Entry, Accounting, Archive Management
expiring_today.description: Role Summary The financing administrator will be responsible for the daily administration of all loan into the systems (Abacus). After the marketing and loan confirmation from loan officers, the entire customer will be directed to the loan administrator, who will start punching the data directly into the system after interviewing the customer. Furthermore, he will be responsible for loan files and title deeds management in the branch. Duties and Responsibilities Data entry and reports extraction: The financing administrator will be responsible for checking the client file and reconciling it with a checklist. The financing administrator will be responsible for checking the sequence of the documents and uploading them into the system (ABACUS) accordingly. The financing administrator will be responsible for uploading the invoice/bill into the system after financing the client. The financing administrator will be responsible for the correctness of the documents, recording them into the database and keeping them in a file room, The financing administrator will be responsible for adding all the new loan applications to the system. The financing administrator will be responsible for changing any information in the system. The financing administrator will be responsible for reviewing all the required documents and preparing the customer file well before the committee. The financing administrator will be responsible for printing all relevant documents mandatory for the loan committee. The financing administrator will be responsible for generating all the daily operation reports for loan officers, risk officers, credit managers, and branch managers. The financing administrator will be responsible for providing the data if required by the Head office operations team. The financing administrator will be responsible to receive and process the customer’s requests related to printing and sharing information. The financing administrator will also be responsible for initial loan application approvals in the system. The financing administrator will be responsible for adding the customer monitoring information received from loan officers only. The financing administrator will be responsible for sending the special request and getting approval from HQ on processes like back-date transactions, penalty waive-offs, and interest rate changes. The financing administrator will be responsible for making sure that the loan products are disbursed to the client in accordance with credit policy. Loan administrator will be responsible to report Head of Operations in case of any discrepancies found in loan issues and repayments. Documents management: Loan filing management. · Keeping the all-loan files of the clients properly in file room safely manner. · Keeping the pictures of Branch level credit committee members. · Keeping the file in chronological order. · Regular check the completeness of the file. Title deeds safeguard and management. · Keeping the tile deeds of all clients in file. · Regularly check availably of Tite deeds. Loan contracts management. · Keep all contract file safely in his custody. Others: Acting as a cashier in the absence of a cashier. Facilitating the implementation of other technologies including but not limited to biometrics and GPS. Any other task assigned by the branch manager. Job Requirements Afghan citizen; b) Minimum High School diploma (any country); c) Experience handling cash (business or household), experience with a Microfinance Institution preferable; d) Fluent in Dari and English welcome but not essential e) Computer skills in Word and/or Excel; f) Strong organizational and interpersonal skills; g) Able to work independently and in a group, h) willing to take initiative, and energetic; I) Able to learn quickly. Submission Guidelines Submission Guideline The application, consist of a one-page cover letter explaining your interest and suitability for the post along with up-to-date CV, should be sent via email (clearly indicating on the subject line the title of the position and Vacancy Announcement Number) before closing date to the given email address. Or submit hard copy at: Submit your CV along with a cover letter to House # 600, Street # 6, Qala-e-Fatullah, District 10, Kabul, OXUS, Afghanistan. Only short-listed candidates will be notified. No phone calls will be entertained. Submission Email Jobs@oxusaf.org Company: OXUS Afghanistan Location: Multi Location

details.Functional Area: Administrative, Data Entry, Accounting, Archive Management

expiring_today.title: Help Desk Engineer
expiring_today.description: Role Summary Help desk engineer provides technical support and assistance, whether on the phone, in person, or remotely, related to IP network. A help desk engineer responds to customer queries to provide technical assistance, follow up with related technical teams till resolving the customer issues. Duties and Responsibilities · Serve as the first point of contact for customers seeking technical assistance over the remote access, phone and email. · Assisting customer in install and configure network devices (switches, routers, wireless routers, access points) when the customer need support. · Pass on any feedback or suggestions by customers to the related AFTEL internal team. · Troubleshoot system and network problems, diagnosing and solving hardware or software faults. · Properly document all customer complaint, interactions and troubleshooting actions into the daily report. · Install, monitor and maintain computer systems and networks. · Utilize the department’s knowledge base to determine proper troubleshooting course of action. · Attend meetings when required. · Implementation of any other tasks assign by line manager. · Follow up with customers and relative local teams to ensure issues are resolved. · Ability to work in a 24/7 shift environment and coordinate effectively with multiple teams. Job Requirements Bachelor of Computer Science, or information technology, with 3 years’ relevant experience, in the Help Desk, IT-NOC, and relevant departments. Skills Required: • Having official CCNA is must and CCNP is preferred • Having skills in computer programs (Ms. Office). • Good speaking and writing skills in English, Dari, and Pashto. • Good knowledge of IP Networks, optical fiber transmission. • Ability to work under pressure, without administrative support. • Ability to undertake a variety of tasks within the same time frame. • Good skill in diagnosing and analyzing network problems. • Familiar with the telecom network elements. Submission Guidelines متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (Help disk-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

expiring_today.title: Senior Internal Audit Officer ( Re- Announced )
expiring_today.description: About Agricultural Development Fund The Agricultural Development Fund (ADF) will act as a second-tier wholesale lending institution that will lend to intermediaries in the agricultural value chain, who will then on-lend to small commercial farmers, defined as farmers with 1-30 hectares. ADF is capitalized by a $100 million grant provided by the United States Government to the Government of the Islamic Republic of Afghanistan to increase lending to the agriculture sector to create a more competitive agriculture sector through expanded agricultural production and increased incomes for agricultural households. ADF will lend directly and indirectly to banks, non-bank financial institutions, credit unions, microfinance institutions and non-financial intermediaries such as private farmer associations, farm stores, agricultural depots, food processors, agribusinesses and other market participants and informal providers of finance that support the development of agricultural value chains in Afghanistan and can enhance the supply of agricultural credit to the end-borrowers at the farm level. Until it transitions to the Government of Afghanistan in 2014, the ADF is managed by the Agriculture Credit Enhancement (ACE) program a USAID contract. Job Description Reviewing the policies and procedures to identify process gaps and control lapses. Conducting internal control / system reviews of the activities / processes and / or conducting investigations and preparing report of the findings & recommendations. Assist the Head of Internal Audit in developing the Annual Internal Audit Plan. Carrying out risk assessments and report the results to the Head of Internal Audit. Manage audits / reviews in line with the approved Annual Internal Audit Plan. Reviewing the working papers for audits / investigations / reviews conducted to ensure their completeness and accuracy and confirm that the same is in accordance with the IIA standards. Preparing / reviewing and finalizing of internal audit reports. Follow-up on issues identified during audits / reviews / visits. Preparation of internal audit presentations for management review and FAC. Undertake professional development activities and acquire and disseminate knowledge and participate in the profession-related seminars / workshops. Review of Internal Audit checklists and other key working papers to ensure complete and appropriate coverage of Internal Audit procedures. Finalizing internal audit reports / audit ratings and presenting the same to management and FAC. Provide fair and balanced insights into current, emerging, and potential issues, trends and opportunities that are aimed at enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of management and control processes. Visiting the regional offices according to the Annual Audit Plan and carry out internal audit missions as per the Internal Audit Plan. Executing the risk assessments and internal audit activities in accordance with the assigned mandate. He/She will have access to all administrative and financial documents after approval of management. Any other duties as assigned by supervisor. Job Requirements BBA, Master degree in Business administration & ACCA . Minimum of 5 years Experience Having good knowledge of IFRS and IAS. Excellent Language proficiency in spoken and written Pashto, Dari, and English. Excellent interpersonal skills Problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a team Ability to create a supportive working relationship with all project teams Ability to work under pressure Submission Guideline All interested qualified applicants are encouraged to send their CV and Cover Letter indicating the position title and vacancy number (ADF- 275 ) in the subject line before the closing date to the below email address. Submission Email Vacancies@adf-af.org

details.Education: Bachelor of business Administration, Master in Business Administration & ACCA

expiring_today.title: Technician (WIFI Services Installer)
expiring_today.salary: As per company Salary Scale Policy
expiring_today.description: About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations. Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues. Job Description Working with HKB-ICT requires full sort of work experience, strong interpersonal skills, good orientation towards working with people in group or lonely, strong intentions to work and grow, able to under loads and be task oriented. The postholder will lead the development of our portfolio in Afghanistan, including identifying future business development opportunities and overseeing the writing of new project proposals. The post holder will ensure effective office management so that all functions are carried out in line with organization rules, local regulatory requirements and HKB-ICT guidelines. Generally, applicants need to earn at least three years of professional experience in the fields of installation, troubleshoots, alignment and other information technology related area within the relevant scope of business. You must be able to form and cultivate effective relationships huge range of customer at all levels, which will be considered as key to your success. You should be able to manage effective teamwork. You must also have strong presentation, negotiation, and communication skills, be able to make decisions concerning IT goral and be able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously. Managers in this industry should have strong technical skills. Some courses you may take for a degree program related to IT technical clerk include the following: Information Technology Networking Job Requirements This remains highly important that you should be able to manage large-scale of work and load, face different challenges and work complexities, with strong and proven quality to deliver high-quality representation of the company to the society within the deadline and budget. Beyond these critical, core areas of skills and experience, you will also have to: KEY COMPETENCIES AND REQUIREMENTS Good Customer Service Skill Excellent Communication Skill Verbal and Written Skills Good Skill and Knowledge in IT Network Security Excellent Technical Skill in IT Network Routing and Switching (CCNA, MCP, MTCNA, Huawei RTN) Language requirements: English Able and Licensed Motorcyclist. Ability to meet deadlines; work under pressure, tact, negotiation skills, organizational skills etc. Analytical and problem-solving skills and decision-making skills. Be familiar with network operating system and Telecommunication basics DUTIES AND RESPONSIBLITIES Install and configure wireless point to multipoint antennas. Install and configure wireless equipment plus home AP, routers and switch. Troubleshoot the client indoor units and routers. Documents and report network problems and resolution for future reference. Have a sound knowledge of latest wireless technologies and equipment. Able to climb on tower and work at heights Familiar with ISP power system components Install Telecom/IT equipment at customer premises Connect and set up hardware and point to point testing Input and maintain IP addresses and be familiar with getting remote access know all troubleshooting procedure and IP related commands Respond to user needs and questions regarding network access. Perform other related duties as required during working hours programs Submission Guideline Those who fulfill the above-mentioned criteria should send their updated CV & Cover letter to the email below: While applying, kindly mention the Vacancy number “HKB/KABUL/TECHNICIAN/2026” in the subject line of E-mail. Without doing so, your application will not be considered complete. Submission Email hr@hindukush-bridge.com

details.Salary: As per company Salary Scale Policy
details.Experience: At least 1 year of field experience
details.Years of Experience: At least 1 year of field experience

expiring_soon.title: Finance Assistant
expiring_soon.category: Procurement and logistics, Data Entry, Financial Reporting, Finance
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary The Finance Assistant will be responsible for assisting with financial transactions, budgeting, and financial reporting. This role involves maintaining accurate financial records, conducting financial analysis, and ensuring compliance with relevant financial regulations. Additionally, the Finance Assistant will collaborate with line manager to develop and monitor budgets, prepare financial reports, and contribute to the overall financial well-being of the foundation. Proficiency in utilizing financial applications, strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and ability to work collaboratively is the key requirements for this role. Duties and Responsibilities Assisting the Finance and Logistics Manager in handling the financial affairs of the Foundation Entering the income and daily expenses in the Foundation’s financial system Scanning all the financial documents of the Foundation Contribution in preparation of the monthly allowance distributions Cooperation with the Social Care Department in distributing of the Monthly Allowances and in-kind aids to the registered orphaned families Assisting the Finance and Logistics Manager in preparing financial reports Preparing the employees’ payrolls according to the attendance reports received from Admin/HR Department Dealing with the daily expenses of the office under the supervision of the Line Manager Any other tasks assigned by the Line Manager Job Requirements Bachelor’s degree preferably in finance and accounting At least two years of experience in financial fields Ability to work under pressure Computer skills especially with QuickBooks and MS Office packages Fluency in English and Dari both written and spoken High skills in planning and reporting Submission Guidelines Please submit your CV to hr@alayn.af Deadline for applications: 26/April/2026 Please mention the position title and reference number in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application will not be evaluated. Please note that only shortlisted applicants will be contacted. If you do not hear from us, your application has not been successful.

details.Functional Area: Procurement and logistics, Data Entry, Financial Reporting, Finance

expiring_soon.title: مسؤل موشن گرافیک و پرودکشن
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary مسئولیت های وظیفوی: تنظیم، کنترول و نظارت از تمام بخش های پرودکشن، ویدیوگرافی، طراحی برندینگ و ترتیب اعلانات تجارتی برای محصولات وخدمات بانک. Duties and Responsibilities شرح وظایف: طرح و ترتیب پلان کاری ماهوار، ربعوار و سالانه در مطابقت با برنامه های بانک ملی افغان جهت نیل به اهداف تعیین شده. طراحی و دیزاین متفاوت و خلاقانه اعلانات ویدیویی برای صفحات اجتماعی ثبت صدا و تصویر (ویدیو) برداری برای اعلانات و بازاریابی طراحی دیزاین و ساخت انیمیشن ها نوشتن سکریپت برای محصولات و خدمات بانکی طراحی و دیزاین انفوگرافیک ها برای بخش های تبلیغاتی طراحی و ساخت ویدیوهای کوتاه برای محصولات و خدمات بانکی تامین ارتباط و همآهنگی با سایر بخش های مرتبط جهت پیشبرد امور محوله انتقال مهارت های مسلکی به شیوه تدویر ورکشاپ ها، سیمینار ها و آموزش های جریان کار به کارکنان مربوطه کنترول و نظارت از تمام بخش های پرودکشن تنظیم و کنترول سوند سیستم پرودکشن و برنامه ها بصورت دوامدار یکسان سازی دیزاین از محصولات وخدمات بانک طبق روش های جدید گرافیکی عکس برداری، ثبت ویدیو از رویدادهای مختلف بانک انجام سایر وظایف که از طرف مدیریت ومعاونیت محول میگردد Job Requirements تحصیلات، تجارت ومهارت های لازم: درجه تحصیلی : دارای سند تحصیلی حد اقل لیسانس با داشتن سند های مختلف مانند بخش گرافیک انمیشن و غیره. تجارب لازم : حد اقل 5 سال تجربه کاری مرتبط به وظیفه مهارت های دیگر : A. کمپیوتر : پروگرام های افیس، آشنائی باسیستم های مورد استفاده بانک وسیستم های گرافیکی و مهارت های کمپیوتری در برنامه های ،Photoshop , Corel draw - Adobe Premiere pro, Illustrator, In Design,، Cinema 4D، Adobe After Effects، Adobe Audition و سایر برنامه های مرتبط B. لسان: زبان های رسمی کشور (دری، پشتو) و انگلیسی C. مراسلات اداری : مهارت کافی در مراسلات اداری داشته باشد Submission Guidelines Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

details.Years of Experience: حد اقل 5 سال تجربه کاری مرتبط به وظیفه.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services. Duties and Responsibilities Card Issuance and Management: Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA. Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management. Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations. Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution: Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay. Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks. Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity. Customer Service and Support: Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues. Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes. Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response. Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website. Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products. Business and Operations: Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department. Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities. Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements. Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management. Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses. Cross-functional Responsibilities: Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives. Support the rollout of new digital products and services. Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting. Reporting and Documentation: Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems. Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred). Experience: Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role. Technical Competencies: Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems. Experience in settlement and dispute management. Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills. Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms. Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage. Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS). Other Skills: Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities. Excellent communication and coordination skills. Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Chief Information Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
